case_title: CHAVEZ, FRANCISCO vs. DIAZ, LEO et al

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALARCON, JOSE LUIS SUED AS DOE 1

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, LEO DIAZ, CONSUELO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 89 BANKS ST, LEASE FORFEITED
FIRST PAPER RESPONSE/PLEADING $10,001 - $25,000 STRICKEN BY COURT ORDER FOR FAILURE TO REDEEM INVALID CHECK FOR TRANSACTION 2C23P1190000; NO FURTHER FILINGS ON PART OF
